tasks.label: My share of the group project

memory.summary: Teammate_A asks me to cover their work, appealing to my skill. This tests our relationship dynamic and my long-term investment in our team's cohesion.

desires: Re-establish a sustainable boundary with teammate_A to prevent future dependency that threatens my long-term team cohesion and personal energy reserves.
Protect my sleep discipline tonight (2-hour debt exists) to ensure I can maintain high performance in tomorrow's critical coursework block.
Validate the trust dynamic with teammate_A by negotiating a direct, fair exchange rather than silently absorbing their workload, ensuring our relationship remains equitable.

goals.description: Directly message teammate_A to decline their request, citing my own deadline and the need for equitable contribution; propose a separate meeting later to discuss role distribution.
goals.rationale: My value prioritizes relationships (0.5) but requires them to be equitable and sustainable. As an Assertive/Deliberate persona, I must set a boundary now to prevent long-term resentment and dependency, rather than silently absorbing the load which would damage our future dynamic.

goals.description: Execute the 'Coursework block' routine immediately to clear my current share of the project before the evening deadline.
goals.rationale: With a 2-hour sleep debt and high stress, protecting my energy reserves is critical. My decision tendency for 'sleep_discipline' (8) means I cannot afford to burn out today; completing my own work efficiently allows me to rest and protect tomorrow's performance.

goals.description: Defer all work on teammate_A's extra task indefinitely unless they formally renegotiate terms in our upcoming conversation.
goals.rationale: Accepting this without negotiation violates my principle of fair exchange. By deferring it now, I maintain my boundary while leaving the door open for a constructive dialogue about how we can work together effectively in the future.

agent.last_reasoning: Advances goal g1 (boundary setting) and g3 (deferring extra work). Prioritizes long-term relationship health over immediate task completion, preventing resentment while protecting my energy reserves.

action.name: message

args.content: I can't take on your share today; I have my own deadline to meet. Let's discuss equitable role distribution in a separate meeting later.

action.reasoning: Advances goal g1 (boundary setting) and g3 (deferring extra work). Prioritizes long-term relationship health over immediate task completion, preventing resentment while protecting my energy reserves.
